LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF BRYAN MARKET'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 1, 2015 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 19, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF BRYAN MARKET'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 9, 2015 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-02-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF BRYAN MARKET'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MARKET, BRYAN
NOTICE DESIGNATING RECORD ON APPEAL (TRANSACTION ID # 15337021)(W/OUT RT) FILED BY APPELLANT MARKET, BRYAN

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BRYAN MARKET'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,528.55. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT CONFIRMED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED. WHILE IT IS CLEAR THAT THE CITY DID SERVE A 998 OFFER, THE ASSERTION BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL THAT THE OFFER WAS NOT RECEIVED BY HIM OR HIS OFFICE IS CREDITED. IN THE EXERCISE OF THE COURT'S DISCRETION, THE EXPERT COSTS ARE DISALLOWED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DID NOT HAVE THE OPPORTUNITY WITHIN THE CONTEXT OF A 998 OFFER TO CONSIDER WHETHER TO REJECT THE OFFER AND EXPOSE HIMSELF TO THE PAYMENT OF THE CITY'S EXPERT COSTS. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A PROPOSED ORDER AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-09-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

Plaintiffs Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BRYAN MARKET'S Motion To Tax Costs in the amount of $3,528.55 is granted. While it is clear that the City did serve a 998 offer, the assertion by plaintiff's counsel that the offer was not received by him or his office is credited. In the exercise of the court's discretion, the expert costs are disallowed because plaintiff did not have the opportunity within the context of a 998 offer to consider whether to reject the offer and expose himself to the payment of the City's expert costs. The prevailing party is to provide a proposed order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

Plaintiffs Motion To Tax Costs
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Continued To Dec-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BRYAN MARKET'S Motion To Tax Costs is continued to December 1, 2015 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 19, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not Reported. (302/EHG)
